task_updates.executor_notes: Set `paddingTop` to `0px` in `LayoutMainContent` and removed the unused editor-pane fields from `usePanes()`. Verified the generations-pane `paddingBottom` path remained intact.

Added a route-unlock `useEffect` in `EditorPaneComponent` with dependencies on `location.pathname`, `isEditorPaneLocked`, and `setIsEditorPaneLocked`. Verified it runs before the video-editor early return and only unlocks when the pane is currently locked.

Changed `PanesContext` so the ideal editor height is `70%` when `locks.gens` is true and `90%` otherwise, and gated compression behind `bothVisible`. Verified `layoutValue` now exposes the variable `editorPaneHeight` and effective heights flow from that branch.

Updated the LayoutMainContent style assertion to expect `paddingTop: 0px` and removed the unused editor-pane fields from the default pane mock. Verified the same test still covers `marginRight`, `marginLeft`, `paddingBottom`, and `willChange`, and the targeted Vitest file passed.

Removed the generations-offset double subtraction from `useEditorPane()` and trimmed the now-unused generations-pane fields from `usePanes()`. Verified the returned `adjustedEditorPaneHeight` now equals the context-provided `effectiveEditorPaneHeight` with no further reduction.

Updated PanesContext tests for visibility-aware editor heights, rewrote the visibility-toggle expectation, and added explicit 70% locked-gens and 90% unlocked-gens coverage. Verified the targeted PanesContext Vitest file passed, including the unchanged both-visible compression tests.
Ran all four affected Vitest files and they passed. No follow-up code changes were required.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `LayoutMainContent` still computes `paddingBottom` from `isGenerationsPaneLocked || isGenerationsPaneOpen` and `effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight` after removing the editor `paddingTop` logic.
Confirmed the new `useEffect` is placed before the `isVideoEditorRoute(...)` early return, so the unlock path still executes on editor-route navigation.
Confirmed `editorPaneHeight` is now derived from a `70%/90%` fraction and is passed through `layoutValue`, so context consumers see the variable ideal height.
Confirmed the updated LayoutMainContent assertion still verifies `marginRight`, `marginLeft`, `paddingBottom`, and `willChange`; only the `paddingTop` expectation changed.
Confirmed `useEditorPane()` now returns the context `effectiveEditorPaneHeight` directly through `adjustedEditorPaneHeight`, with no generations offset subtraction left in the hook.
Confirmed the existing both-visible tests remain valid and passed unchanged in the targeted `PanesContext.test.tsx` run, so the compression path still behaves identically when both panes are visible.
Confirmed `src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts` passes, so the visibility-aware `effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight` change did not break the generations-only bottom offset path.
